name: DuckDB Labs
description: Commercial support and consultancy for DuckDB, the in-process analytical SQL database used across data science and ML pipelines.

seo.title: DuckDB Labs — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: DuckDB Labs: Commercial support and consultancy for DuckDB, the in-process analytical SQL database used across data science and ML pipelines.

when_to_use: In-process OLAP queries on Parquet/CSV files without a server
Analytics on data lake files directly in Python notebooks
Lightweight Spark replacement for single-machine ETL scripts
Running SQL on S3-backed files without data movement
Embedded analytics engine for Python data science workflows

pros: Creators of DuckDB providing direct expertise
Critical for production DuckDB at scale
cons: Consultancy model, not a product you just buy
European focus may complicate US time zones
Small team so capacity can constrain availability
review.verdict: Essential safety net for teams betting heavily on DuckDB in production; not a product offering.
review.best_for: Teams running DuckDB at production scale needing core-team support
review.not_for: Teams just experimenting with DuckDB on laptops or small projects
